name: LeaderLinePlacing
summary: The LeaderLinePlacing class defines a placing where the object is placed attached to a leader line.

constructors.name: LeaderLinePlacing
constructors.summary: Creates a new leader line placing instance. The given point defines the start point of the leader line.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

properties.name: StartPoint
properties.summary: The start point of the leader line (if multiple leader lines exist, only returns the first).
